Class TerritoryService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.service.TerritoryService
public class TerritoryService extends Object
Business logic for claiming and unclaiming chunks on behalf of clans.

Writes are always DB-first: TerritoryCache is updated only after the DB operation completes successfully. Events are fired on the main thread via the Bukkit scheduler.

  • Constructor Details

    • TerritoryService

      public TerritoryService(IClaimRepository claimRepository, TerritoryCache territoryCache, org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, int maxClaimsPerClan)
      Parameters:
      claimRepository - persistence layer for claims
      territoryCache - in-memory chunk-ownership cache
      plugin - the owning plugin, used for scheduler hops
      maxClaimsPerClan - the maximum number of chunks a single clan may own

  • Method Details

    • setMaxClaimsPerClan

      public void setMaxClaimsPerClan(int max)
      Updates the maximum claims-per-clan limit. Called after a config reload.
      Parameters:
      max - the new limit

    • getMaxClaimsPerClan

      public int getMaxClaimsPerClan()
      Returns:
      the maximum number of chunks a single clan may own

    • claimChunk

      public CompletableFuture<Void> claimChunk(UUID clanId, String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ)
      Claims a chunk on behalf of a clan.

      Fails silently (returned future completes exceptionally) if the chunk is already claimed or the clan has reached its claim limit.

      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan claiming the chunk
      world - the world name
      chunkX - the chunk X coordinate
      chunkZ - the chunk Z coordinate
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the claim is persisted and cached
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the chunk is already claimed or the clan is at its limit

    • claimChunks

      public CompletableFuture<List<int[]>> claimChunks(UUID clanId, String world, List<int[]> chunks)
      Claims many chunks at once on behalf of a clan.

      Chunks already claimed (by any clan) are skipped using the cache, and the per-clan limit is enforced once for the whole batch: if the candidates would exceed the limit, only as many as fit are claimed. The survivors are inserted in a single transaction, then the cache is updated and one ClanClaimEvent.Post is fired per claimed chunk on the main thread.

      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan claiming the chunks
      world - the world name
      chunks - the candidate chunks as {chunkX, chunkZ} pairs
      Returns:
      a future of the chunks actually claimed (a subset of the input; empty if none)
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the clan is already at its claim limit

    • unclaimChunk

      public CompletableFuture<Void> unclaimChunk(UUID clanId, String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ)
      Unclaims a chunk owned by the given clan.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan that owns the chunk
      world - the world name
      chunkX - the chunk X coordinate
      chunkZ - the chunk Z coordinate
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the claim is removed from the DB and cache
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the chunk is not owned by the given clan

    • unclaimAll

      public CompletableFuture<Void> unclaimAll(UUID clanId)
      Removes all claims for a clan. Used during clan disbandment.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan whose claims to remove
      Returns:
      a future that completes when all claims are removed

    • getClaimingClan

      public Optional<UUID> getClaimingClan(String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ)
      Returns the owning clan for a chunk. Reads from the cache.
      Parameters:
      world - the world name
      chunkX - the chunk X coordinate
      chunkZ - the chunk Z coordinate
      Returns:
      the owning clan's UUID, or empty if the chunk is unclaimed

    • seedCache

      public CompletableFuture<Void> seedCache()
      Seeds the TerritoryCache from the database. Called once on startup.
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the cache is populated

    • getClaimsForClan

      public CompletableFuture<List<ClaimModel>> getClaimsForClan(UUID clanId)
      Parameters:
      clanId - the clan to query
      Returns:
      a future of all claims currently owned by the clan
